name: New Potatoes and Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and scrub the potatoes.
2. Peel a thin skin from each potato.
3. Boil the potatoes in salted water until they are fork-tender.
4. Drain the potatoes and return them to the pan.
5. Add butter, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
6. Over very low heat, melt the butter.
7. Toss everything together until well combined.
8. Transfer to a serving bowl and garnish with chopped green onions.
Serves 4 to 5.
